description_long: This is a round, black ceramic plate featuring a serving of food arranged in three distinct sections. The plate holds two sunny-side-up eggs with bright yellow yolks, a portion of golden-brown diced potatoes, and a mound of vibrant green spinach puree. The plate itself has a slightly raised rim and a matte finish, giving it a modern, understated appearance. The food is neatly presented, with each component occupying a separate area on the plate. There are no visible markings, logos, or decorative patterns on the plate's surface.
description: A round black ceramic plate with sunny-side-up eggs, diced potatoes, and green spinach puree, all neatly arranged. The plate has a matte finish and a simple, modern look.
description_view_0: The plate is seen with the eggs most prominent in the foreground, potatoes and spinach puree visible behind.
description_view_1: The eggs are slightly angled to the left, with the spinach puree and potatoes more evenly visible side by side.
description_view_2: The potatoes are most prominent, with the eggs partially covering them and the spinach puree mostly in the background.
description_view_3: The eggs are again in the foreground, but the potatoes are more visible to the left and the spinach puree is partially obscured.
